name: Oh My God
overview: Thanh and An met in a fateful return to their hometown, without knowing that they had been "residual brothers" for a long time. With heaven and earth, people and harmony, two innocent teenagers who have never known the smell of life have experienced the feeling of gradual and irresistible curvature between heaven and earth, the immense green plateau, full of fragrant flowers and strange grass...

trailers.title: TỔ ĐỘ | OFFICIAL TRAILER | Công chiếu 17.01.2023 trên kênh TỔ ĐỘ
